summary: Frontend testing for navbar redesign, page transitions, and mobile responsiveness. All 12 test features verified. Premium floating glassmorphic navbar working correctly with adaptive dark/light theming. Page transitions with fade-in animation working. Mobile responsiveness verified on 390px viewport.

issues: During page transition animation, content appears faded/partially visible - this is expected behavior from framer-motion AnimatePresence

navbar_desktop: 1. Floating glassmorphic pill navbar visible on landing page (dark theme)
navbar_light_theme: 11. Dark text color on light theme
12. Dark CTA button with white text on light theme
13. Calculator page (/tools/*) has light theme navbar
active_page_highlighting: 17. Pricing link highlighted/active on /pricing page (bg-black class applied)
mobile_navbar: 18. Hamburger menu toggle visible on 390px viewport
19. Desktop nav items hidden on mobile
20. Mobile menu opens with all nav links
21. Mobile menu contains: Free Tools (4 calculators), Benchmarks, Pricing
22. Mobile CTA button 'Start free' visible in menu
scroll_behavior: 23. Navbar hides on scroll down (opacity: 0, transform: translateY(-100px))
page_transitions: 25. AnimatePresence wrapper in App.js with mode='wait'
27. Fade-in animation observed during navigation (opacity 0->1, y 8->0)
mobile_responsiveness: 29. Pricing page cards properly stacked on mobile
30. Calculator page usable on mobile (sliders, chart visible)

critical_code_review_comments: Navbar uses inset-x-0 mx-auto for centering (avoids Framer Motion transform conflicts)
Top position is top-12 to sit below announcement bar at top-0
Mobile menu panel positioned at top-[108px]
isDarkPage() function correctly identifies dark pages (/ and /preview/*)
PageTransition uses framer-motion variants with ease [0.22, 1, 0.36, 1]
context_for_next_testing_agent: Navbar redesign complete and verified. Premium floating glassmorphic pill design working with adaptive dark/light theming. Dark theme on landing page (/), light theme on /pricing and /tools/* pages. Page transitions using framer-motion AnimatePresence working. Mobile responsiveness verified on 390px viewport. All 12 requested features tested and passing.

mocked_api.note: Frontend-only testing, no API mocking needed

test_coverage_summary.Feature 1 - Navbar Desktop Dark Theme: PASS - Floating glassmorphic pill visible on landing page with logo, Free Tools dropdown, Benchmarks, Pricing, Start free CTA
test_coverage_summary.Feature 2 - Navbar Desktop Light Theme: PASS - White glass with dark text on /pricing and /tools/* pages
test_coverage_summary.Feature 3 - Free Tools Dropdown: PASS - Opens/closes with 4 calculator links (100cr, ARR, Runway, Growth)
test_coverage_summary.Feature 5 - Mobile Hamburger Menu: PASS - Visible and clickable on 390px viewport
test_coverage_summary.Feature 6 - Mobile Menu Content: PASS - Opens with all nav links (tools, benchmarks, pricing, CTA)
test_coverage_summary.Feature 7 - Scroll Behavior: PASS - Hide on scroll down, show on scroll up
test_coverage_summary.Feature 8 - Page Transitions: PASS - Fade-in animation on page navigation
test_coverage_summary.Feature 10 - Mobile Pricing Page: PASS - Cards properly stacked on mobile
test_coverage_summary.Feature 11 - Mobile Calculator Page: PASS - Usable on mobile (sliders, chart visible)
test_coverage_summary.Feature 12 - Announcement Bar: PASS - Visible at top with Founder Plan ₹899/year offer
